title: Language Change
scenario: Changing voice prompt language in Poly Studio Mobile app triggers firmware update to apply the selected language
steps: 1. Pair and connect a supported Poly Bluetooth headset to the Android device.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Language.
4. Tap the current language to display a scrollable list of supported languages.
5. Select a new language from the list.
6. Observe the popup that appears: "You must update the software to apply the selected language. The language change only applies to audio" with "Later" and "Update now" buttons.
7. Tap "Update now" to proceed to the Software Update screen.
8. Complete the DFU process: tap Continue → Start Update → Close.
9. Navigate back to Device Settings → Language and verify the selected language is displayed.
expected: The selected language is displayed in Device Settings → Language, and voice prompts/alerts play in the newly selected language.
